original_prompt: Seamlessly integrated into the provided background scene, occupying the mid-left foreground is Julius Caesar, a young man, dressed in an Adidas running shirt, dark grey track pants, and black sneakers. To his immediate right and slightly below him, positioned in the bottom-right foreground, stands Alfred Hitchcock, an elderly woman, holding a Keychron mechanical keyboard, and wearing a pastel pink cardigan over a cream blouse and navy blue pants. Both are standing near each other and are looking directly at one another, photorealistic subjects, sharp focus on characters.

entities.description: Julius Caesar, a young man, is prominently featured in the mid-left foreground of the scene, dressed in an Adidas running shirt, dark grey track pants, and black sneakers.

Alfred Hitchcock, portrayed as an elderly woman, is positioned in the bottom-right foreground, holding a Keychron mechanical keyboard and wearing a pastel pink cardigan over a cream blouse and navy blue pants. She is standing near Julius Caesar and looking directly at him.
Adidas running shirt worn by Julius Caesar.
Keychron mechanical keyboard held by Alfred Hitchcock.
